---
title: "Untitled"
author: "T.Laffargue"
date: "2024-11-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
setwd("~/Desktop/thèse/Microbiome Biodiversity/Bacteria and fungi/Typing Drosophila/All sequence")

############################################ instal packages #########################################################

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("Biostrings")

install.packages("readxl")
install.packages("writexl")


library(Biostrings)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(dplyr)


########################################### Importing data ##########################################################

#COI 1
COI1 <- "consensus.edit.COI1.fasta"
sequences1 <- readDNAStringSet(COI1)

sequence_names1 <- names(sequences1)
sequence_data1 <- as.character(sequences1)


COI1_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names1, Sequence = sequence_data1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI1_table)


# COI 2

COI2 <- "consensus.edit.COI2.fasta"
sequences2 <- readDNAStringSet(COI2)

sequence_names2 <- names(sequences2)
sequence_data2 <- as.character(sequences2)


COI2_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names2, Sequence = sequence_data2, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI2_table)

# COI 3

COI3 <- "consensus.edit.COI3.fasta"
sequences3 <- readDNAStringSet(COI3)

sequence_names3 <- names(sequences3)
sequence_data3 <- as.character(sequences3)


COI3_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names3, Sequence = sequence_data3, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI3_table)

# COI 4

COI4 <- "consensus.edit.COI4.fasta"
sequences4 <- readDNAStringSet(COI4)

sequence_names4 <- names(sequences4)
sequence_data4 <- as.character(sequences4)


COI4_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names4, Sequence = sequence_data4, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI4_table)

# COI 5

COI5 <- "consensus.edit.COI5.fasta"
sequences5 <- readDNAStringSet(COI5)

sequence_names5 <- names(sequences5)
sequence_data5 <- as.character(sequences5)


COI5_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names5, Sequence = sequence_data5, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI5_table)

# COI 6

COI6 <- "consensus.edit.COI6.fasta"
sequences6 <- readDNAStringSet(COI6)

sequence_names6 <- names(sequences6)
sequence_data6 <- as.character(sequences6)


COI6_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names6, Sequence = sequence_data6, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI6_table)

# COI 7

COI7 <- "consensus.edit.COI7.fasta"
sequences7 <- readDNAStringSet(COI7)

sequence_names7 <- names(sequences7)
sequence_data7 <- as.character(sequences7)


COI7_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names7, Sequence = sequence_data7, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI7_table)

# COI 8

COI8 <- "consensus.edit.COI8.fasta"
sequences8 <- readDNAStringSet(COI8)

sequence_names8 <- names(sequences8)
sequence_data8 <- as.character(sequences8)


COI8_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names8, Sequence = sequence_data8, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI8_table)

# COI 9

COI9 <- "consensus.edit.COI9.fasta"
sequences9 <- readDNAStringSet(COI9)

sequence_names9 <- names(sequences9)
sequence_data9 <- as.character(sequences9)


COI9_table <- data.frame(Name = sequence_names9, Sequence = sequence_data9, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
View(COI9_table)

# COI Metadata

COI_metadata <- read_excel("COI_Data.xlsx")
View(COI_metadata)

######################################################### Cleaning COI table ##################################################################################

#delete refs sequence

table_names <- paste0("COI", 1:9, "_table") # Regroup all table in one list
tables <- mget(table_names)


filter_rows <- function(df) { # Verif
  if (!is.data.frame(df) || is.null(rownames(df))) {
    stop("Table is not a data.frame or has no rownames.")
  }
  rows_to_keep <- !grepl("^(Drosophila|Zaprionus)", rownames(df)) # Identifing line to keep
  return(df[rows_to_keep, , drop = FALSE]) # reorient table
}

filtered_tables <- lapply(tables, function(table) { # Apply the function to each table
  tryCatch({
    filter_rows(table)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Error processing table: ", e$message)
    return(NULL)  # Return Null in case of mistake
  })
})

filtered_tables <- filtered_tables[!sapply(filtered_tables, is.null)] # Delete NULL table from the list
list2env(filtered_tables, envir = .GlobalEnv) # re-inject in "normale" environment.




# Add round col

table_names <- paste0("COI", 1:9, "_table") # Regroup all table in one list
tables <- mget(table_names)

tables <- mapply(function(table, round_number) {
  table$round <- round_number  # Add col
  return(table)
}, tables, 1:9, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

list2env(tables, envir = .GlobalEnv) # re-inject in "normale" environment.




#reformulate sequence name

table_names <- paste0("COI", 1:9, "_table")
tables <- mget(table_names)

clean_names <- function(df) { # Cleaning col "Name"
  if (!"Name" %in% colnames(df)) { # verify that col "Name" exist
    stop("The table does not contain a 'Name' column.")
  }
  df$Name <- sub(".*_(F[1-8]R[1-9][0-2]?).*", "\\1", df$Name) # extracted primer from the sequence name (F1R1, etc.)
  
  return(df)
}


tables <- lapply(tables, clean_names) # apply fonction to each table
list2env(tables, envir = .GlobalEnv) # re-inject in "normale" environment.




#Concat tables
table_names <- paste0("COI", 1:9, "_table")
tables <- mget(table_names) 


COI_sequence <- do.call(rbind, tables) # Combine tables in one
COI_sequence$source <- rep(table_names, times = sapply(tables, nrow)) # add col "source" for data origine

COI_sequence$source <- NULL
rownames(COI_sequence) <- NULL
COI_sequence <- COI_sequence[, c("Name", "round", "Sequence")]

View(COI_sequence)




################################################## Creating a consensus sequence table ################################################################

#homogenization of primer format

COI_metadata$Barcodes <- gsub("/", "", COI_metadata$Barcodes)
View(COI_metadata)


#Creat table

consensus_sequence_table <- COI_metadata
View(consensus_sequence_table)

consensus_sequence_table <- merge(
  consensus_sequence_table, 
  COI_sequence[, c("Name", "round", "Sequence")], 
  by.x = c("Barcodes", "Sequencing_Run"), 
  by.y = c("Name", "round"), 
  all.x = TRUE  # keep line of consensus_sequence_table
)

# rename col "Sequence" into "Consensus_Sequence"
colnames(consensus_sequence_table)[colnames(consensus_sequence_table) == "Sequence"] <- "Consensus_Sequence"



write_xlsx(consensus_sequence_table, "COI_consensus_sequence_table.xlsx")

####################################### Creating a fasta file with all COI consensus sequence ###########################################################




COI_sequence <- consensus_sequence_table%>%
  select(samples_ID, Consensus_Sequence)
View(COI_sequence)


output_fasta <- "COI_sequences.fasta" # Output file name

fasta_sequences <- DNAStringSet(COI_sequence$Consensus_Sequence) # Create object type DNAStringSet with sequences
names(fasta_sequences) <- COI_sequence$samples_ID # add names of sequences as name in object DNAStringSet
writeXStringSet(fasta_sequences, filepath = output_fasta, format = "fasta") #write fasta_file
cat("\n✅ Fichier FASTA enregistré sous", output_fasta, "\n")  # writting validation
## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
